title: Knarfy's Dumb Weapons
description: A collection of terrible weapon ideas suggested by audience members, and coded into Minecraft for Knarfy's Video!
body:
# Knarfy's Dumb Weapons
### _Based on your ideas!_
Check out the original video by Knarfy here:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WXwPyKc0Pfg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

_This version of the mod was created specifically for the video and will not be kept up to date. Sorry!_

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)!

### This mod includes 13 new weapon ideas for Minecraft based on comments for YouTube!
Each weapon does something different, and combinations of different weapons and attacks can result in some crazy chaos!

These weapons do not have crafting recipes, and most things are not obtainable in survival mode. Creative mode is required to access most of these features.

**Developers:** [TheTaciturnOne](https://www.youtube.com/@thetaciturnone) & [Sporent](https://www.youtube.com/@sporent)

_Thanks for being a supporter of Knarfy's content! Your views on videos and interactions with mods like this help us to create the best content we can for you! Enjoy the mod and all the chaos to be had with it!_

### !!! Warning for Content Creators !!!
Some of these features may include music or sound effects from Epidemic Sound! These could get your video copyright claimed if you don't have a subscription! You can find more information about Epidemic Sound on their website: https://www.epidemicsound.com/
